name: Swarm of Centipedes
name_jp: ムカデの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>進</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>軍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is flipped face-up: You can target 1 other monster on the field; change it to face-up Attack Position or face-down Defense Position. You can only use this effect of "Swarm of Centipedes" once per turn. Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can change this card to face-down Defense Position.
mnst_eff: If this card is flipped face-up: You can target 1 other monster on the field; change it to face-up Attack Position or face-down Defense Position. You can only use this effect of "Swarm of Centipedes" once per turn. Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can change this card to face-down Defense Position.
